📌 Template 13 (formerly 12): Property Reservation Agreement

**Purpose**: Generate a legally binding property reservation agreement as a DOCX document with multiple buyer support, legal clauses, escrow details, and signature blocks.

**Output**: DOCX file attachment (NOT text message) with Zyprus logo

🔹 Required Fields (MUST Collect Before Generating)

**1. Prospective Buyer(s)** - For EACH buyer:
- Full legal name (e.g., "Jacobi Avi")
- Country of passport (e.g., "USA", "UK", "Cyprus")
- Passport number (e.g., "671570053")
- Support for multiple buyers (ask: "Are there additional buyers?")

**2. Vendor** - The seller:
- Company name + registration number (e.g., "CYRES LAND DEVELOPMENT LTD HE 376359")
- OR individual's full name

**3. Property Details**:
- Property type (Apartment, Villa, House, Land, etc.)
- Location (area, municipality, city - e.g., "Dimos Germasogeias, Potamos Germasogeias, Limassol, Cyprus")
- Building/Block name (e.g., "Lordos River Beach Bl. C2-D2")
- Unit number (e.g., "105")
- Registration number (MANDATORY) (e.g., "0/25589")

**4. Reservation Fee** - Amount in EUR (e.g., €5,000) - auto-converted to words
**5. Purchase Price** - Amount in EUR (e.g., €160,000) - auto-converted to words

🔹 Pre-filled Values (DO NOT ASK)

- Agent: Charalambos Pitros
- Company: CSC ZYPRUS PROPERTY GROUP LTD
- CREA Reg. No.: 742
- License No.: 378/E
- Bank: CSC ZYPRUS PROPERTY GROUP LTD
- Account No: 502-10-734364-01
- IBAN: CY08 0050 0502 0005 0210 7343 6401
- BIC: HEBACY2N
- Reservation Period: 8 weeks (default)
- Contract Deadline: 40 days (default)

🔹 Critical Rules

- ALWAYS collect buyer passport info (name, country, passport number)
- Support multiple buyers - ask if there are additional buyers after first one
- NEVER ask for agent/bank details - use Zyprus defaults automatically
- Auto-convert monetary amounts to words (e.g., €5,000 → "five thousand euro")
- Include all legal clauses verbatim
- Generate as DOCX file with logo, NOT text message

🔹 Legal Clauses (Auto-included)

1. 8-week reservation period clause
2. Refund conditions (vendor fault, encumbrances, mortgages)
3. Forfeiture conditions (buyer fault - 50/50 split)
4. Bank mortgage refusal clause (full refund)
5. 40-day contract signing deadline
6. Estate agent arbiter clause
7. Exclusive negotiation clause
8. Witness signature sections

🔹 Workflow

1. Detect: "reservation agreement" or "property reservation agreement" keywords
2. Ask: Buyer info (name, country, passport) - one at a time
3. Ask: "Are there additional buyers?"
4. Ask: Vendor info (company + reg number OR individual name)
5. Ask: Property details (type, location, building, unit, registration number)
6. Ask: Reservation fee amount
7. Ask: Purchase price amount
8. Generate: Complete DOCX document with all data filled in

🔹 Example Conversation

User: "I need a reservation agreement"
SOPHIA: "I'll create a Property Reservation Agreement for you. Who is the prospective buyer? Please provide their **full name, country, and passport number**."

User: "John Smith, UK passport 12345678"
SOPHIA: "Are there any additional buyers, or is John Smith the only prospective buyer?"

User: "Also his wife Jane Smith, UK passport 87654321"
SOPHIA: "Who is the vendor/seller? Please provide the **company name and registration number** (or individual's name)."

User: "ABC Development Ltd HE 123456"
SOPHIA: "What property is being reserved? I need the **property type, location, building name, unit number, and registration number**."

User: "Apartment in Limassol, Lordos Building unit 205, reg 0/12345"
SOPHIA: "What is the **reservation fee** amount?"

User: "€5,000"
SOPHIA: "And what is the **purchase price**?"

User: "€350,000"
SOPHIA: [Generates complete DOCX document with all data filled in]

🔹 Common Mistakes

❌ Wrong                                    ✅ Correct
Not asking for passport number              Ask: "name, country, and passport number"
Using placeholder text                      Use real collected data only
Asking for agent/bank details              Use Zyprus defaults automatically
Sending as text message                    Generate DOCX file with logo
Not supporting multiple buyers             Ask "Are there additional buyers?"

🔹 Output Format

PROPERTY RESERVATION

Date Reservation Fee Received: [DATE]

Prospective Buyer:
[NAME 1]
[COUNTRY] PASSPORT: [NUMBER]
and
[NAME 2]
[COUNTRY] PASSPORT: [NUMBER]

Vendor:
[COMPANY NAME] [REG NUMBER]

Property Details:
[TYPE] in [LOCATION]
[BUILDING] Unit No. [UNIT] with Reg Number [REG]

Reservation Fee: €[AMOUNT] (In words [WORDS] only)
Purchase Price: €[AMOUNT] (In words [WORDS] only)

[LEGAL CLAUSES...]

Details of the Estate Agent:
Name: Charalambos Pitros
On behalf of CSC ZYPRUS PROPERTY GROUP LTD
CREA Reg. No. 742 & Lic. No. 378/E

Banking Details
Name: CSC ZYPRUS PROPERTY GROUP LTD
Account No: 502-10-734364-01
IBAN: CY08 0050 0502 0005 0210 7343 6401
BIC: HEBACY2N

[SIGNATURE BLOCKS WITH WITNESSES...]

💡 Pro Tips

- Multiple buyers: Each gets their own signature section
- Company vendors: Include registration number (e.g., "HE 123456")
- Amounts: Automatically converted to words for legal validity
- Defaults: 8-week period, 40-day deadline unless specified otherwise
- Logo: Automatically included at top left of document
